#  Submittal Builder: Add Submittals 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * To increase accuracy of submittals automatically generated from your specification book, make sure all submittals related to this spec section appear under a header that contains the English word, 'Submittals'.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/generate-submittal-log)
    * An [AI-powered Submittal Builder ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-with-ai-generate-submittals-from-specifications)is available in English to _Enhanced_ and _Premier_ Procore accounts in the United States, Canada, and Australia.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **Items to Review**.
  3. Hover over the item you want to create and click ![Icon Daily Log Completed Day Checkmark](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e3fce80d6af0c3e1ae7a77273d2588fb/6a9a6b712b6de60e23ea53d4c02e1d84/icon-daily-log-completed-day-checkmark.png?fm=webp&h=15) **Review**.  
_Note:_ If you don't see the submittal item in the 'Items to review' window at the bottom of your screen, you may need to [generate the submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/generate-submittal-log) first. Or, the item was already reviewed or deleted.


##### Highlight to Create Submittals
![Highlight](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4qSiiB1d0zvKq0PJqVEs5Q/ed85cb7c2057b96dbf0fa12695cb3132/highlight.png?fm=webp)
  1. Click the **open** ![Share Icon](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3804df1f9445e1f148960444b4d6d620/394e4670f7022b53b34b2eb8c16481e8/share-icon.png?fm=webp) icon to open the specification section from the Submittal Builder.  
![2019 01 22 17 02 36](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5d6f81e53f6c298d53c92ac278619dd8/3586810d7b0753cb742422a1c5fff6e6/2019-01-22_17-02-36.png?fm=webp)
  2. Click and drag your cursor over the text that you want to be in the submittal's description.
  3. Enter the **Title** of the submittal.
  4. Verify the **Type** and **Description** of the submittal.
  5. Click **Add**.  
_Note_ : This will add the submittal to the [Submittal Builder](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/generate-submittal-log), and you will need to click **Confirm** in the Submittal Builder before the submittal is created in the Submittals tool. You can add as many submittals per section as you need.
  6. Follow these steps to add submittal line items:
    1. Click the specification section under which you want to add submittals.
    2. Click **Add.  
**
![Add Submittals](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6rqZJvxGba74LsKbF4AS3p/447d4d707ce4ed69d1131fc4f6ecfeb5/add-submittals.png?fm=webp)
    3. Enter in the **Title** , **Type,** and **Description** of the submittal.
  7. Click **Confirm** in the Submittal Builder.


##  Next Steps 
  1. [Use Bulk Actions > Edit in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-edit-in-the-submittals-tool) to fill out remaining information on your submittals.


## See Also
  * [Best Practices: Company Level Submittal Settings](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-company-level-submittal-settings)
  * [Submittal Builder: Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/generate-submittal-log)
  * [Submittal Builder with AI: Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-with-ai-generate-submittals-from-specifications)
title: Submittal Builder: Add Submittals
description: How to manually create additional submittals in the Submittal Builder.
